problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
